boundary.title: Lander React Structured Data Reusable Components Current Boundary

features.title: Lander-react reusable structured data AggregateRating component
features.description: Implement the governed reusable AggregateRating component or composition surface in @mdwrk/lander-react so mdwrkcom imports the lander-owned surface instead of defining app-local ownership for this structured-data type.
